sources.title: A Priest Needs To Kill A Devil | Exorcist Vengeance | Full Exorcist Horror Movie
sources.description:
A Priest Needs To Kill A Devil | Exorcist Vengeance | Full Exorcist Horror Movie

Father Jozsef is a tough priest, someone the Vatican calls to do their dirty work. When a prominent family is terrorized by a demonic force, Jozsef is called upon by Bishop Canelo to root out the evil, but soon realizes the solution to this mystery is tied to his own past.  He must find the killer and stop the Devil's hold on the family before it's too late.
2022.  Stars: Robert Bronzi, Steven Berkoff, Simon Furness

metadata.Plot: A visiting actress in Washington, D.C., notices dramatic and dangerous changes in the behavior and physical make-up of her 12-year-old daughter. Meanwhile, a young priest at nearby Georgetown University begins to doubt his faith while dealing with his mother's terminal sickness. And, book-ending the story, a frail, elderly priest recognizes the necessity for a show-down with an old demonic enemy.
metadata.Actors: Ellen Burstyn, Max von Sydow, Linda Blair
metadata.Language: English, Latin, Greek, French, German, Arabic, Kurdish
